description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the base/archlinux Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. In this job execute the commands: pacman -Sy --noconfirm npm git python-pip graphviz make, npm install gitbook-cli, ./node_modules/.bin/gitbook install, pip install -r requirements.txt, and PATH=$PATH:`pwd`/bin make all. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed.
